title: Minimal Slider
summary: A lightweight slider pattern that uses native scroll snapping and a tiny enhancement script.

description.main: Use the minimal slider object for touch-first, keyboard-friendly horizontal galleries. The example keeps structure and controls minimal while including a subtle fade animation tied to scroll progress.

attributes.class: Base class and element classes for viewport, track, slide, controls and toolbar.

description.heading: Interactive minimal slider
description.description: Screen reader support, keyboard navigation, touch scrolling, stable snapping, and a lightweight fade transition.
